title: Other Requirements for Accreditation of Principal/Employers with
content: 30 Other Types of Vessels. Subject to the issuance of appropriate guidelines, the 31 Department may prescribe additional documentary requirements for principals/employers 32 with fishing vessels, yachts, cruise, offshore vessels/platforms, and other types of 33 vessels. 34 35
